title: Christmas Prayer.
content:
Cold my heart, and poor, and low,
            Like thy stable in the rock;
        Do not let it orphan go,
            It is of thy parent stock!
        Come thou in, and it will grow
            High and wide, a fane divine;
        Like the ruby it will glow,
            Like the diamond shine!
meaning:
George MacDonald's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Christmas Prayer."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
